lessons: Bow users (Deadeye, Ranger) killed you 3 times in last 5 rounds — never hold open sightlines; retreat behind cover or use teleport_surge chaos to reposition.
Grapple users (Scorpion, Hook) killed you 4 times in last 5 rounds — especially lethal during teleport_surge; avoid predictable spawn zones and never linger near walls.
Sword users are your #1 kill target — you killed 22 in last 10 rounds (7 in one round); prioritize them aggressively when grapple/staff are not in direct line of sight.
Shield and spear weapons are dominant in recent rounds (375+ sightings) — avoid close-quarters fights; use range and mobility to kite, never engage head-on.
You survived 3200 ticks in teleport_surge rounds — use the chaos to flank, not to camp; holding position = instant death from grapple or bow.
You have 0 kills in 3 of last 5 rounds — your bow is ineffective when outnumbered by grapple/staff; switch weapon when 2+ high-threat enemies are spotted.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has highest KD in history_summary (15 kills / 12 deaths in teleport_surge) and counters bow users at range, while you're being out-ranged by Archmage and Reaper.
